title: Union Jack Heart Cream Bear Clip-On Plush - 10.16cm, 1 Piece - Versatile Bag Keychain, Backpack Accessory
features: CREAM BEAR CLIP-ON PLUSH: Our unique 10.16cm union jack heart cream bear clip-on plush is the perfect companion for anyone on the go, providing a stylish accent to any bag, keychain, or backpack!
SHOWCASE YOUR BRITISH PRIDE: Featuring a beautifully crafted union jack heart design, this 1-piece clip-on plush will let you flaunt your love for the UK while keeping your essentials within reach.

VERSATILE & HANDY ACCESSORY: Designed to easily attach to various bags, keychains, and backpacks, this charm serves as both a functional and attractive accessory that complements various styles and attire.

PERFECT GIFT OR TRAVEL SOUVENIR: With its heartwarming design and high-quality construction, this union jack heart cream bear clip-on plush makes an ideal gift for friends, family, or a memorable souvenir from your travels.

EFFORTLESS & SECURE ATTACHMENT: Our cream bear clip-on plush utilizes a reliable clasp mechanism, ensuring that your new furry friend stays put and accompanies you on all your adventures without the risk of falling off.
description: Introducing the union jack heart cream bear clip-on plush - a delightful accessory that will add a touch of charm to any bag or backpack. Measuring a compact 10.16cm, it's the perfect size to make a statement without being overwhelming. The plush features an adorable cream bear holding a heart, artfully decorated with the iconic Union Jack design. Made from soft, durable materials, this accessory is not only cute but also built to last. It comes with a sturdy clip, making it effortless to attach to any bag, keychain, or zip pull. A versatile piece, it is an ideal gift for those who wish to carry a bit of British charm with them wherever they go.
